summary.intent: Investigate and implement CHA-11 (P1.4: CRM store SQLite) — extending the existing CRM crate with pagination, filtering, search, get-contact-with-channels, and wiring SqliteCrmStore into GatewayServices.
summary.outcome: All 5 identified gaps were closed: pagination types added, CrmStore trait extended with filtered/search/joined queries, both SqliteCrmStore and MemoryCrmStore implemented, tracing feature flag added, and SqliteCrmStore wired into GatewayServices. 70/70 tests pass, clippy and rustfmt clean, changes committed on feature branch.

repo: CRM crate uses Secret<String> (secrecy crate) for PII fields (email/phone) as a Rust-side guard only — fields are stored as plaintext in SQLite, so LIKE search works fine by calling expose_secret() at the SQL boundary.
Gateway uses a GatewayServices builder pattern (noop() + with_* methods) for wiring stores and services; CRM store follows the same pattern.
Migrations are feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = "crm")] and run at gateway startup in server.rs — the crm feature is enabled by default in both gateway and CLI Cargo.toml.
CLAUDE.md requires a tracing feature flag on crates that use the tracing crate; the CRM crate was missing this and needed it added.
The project uses nightly rustfmt — format must be applied with the nightly toolchain.
Clippy is run per-crate on macOS without --all-features to skip nvcc/CUDA targets.

code.finding: CrmStore trait had 17 CRUD methods but lacked list_contacts_filtered, list_matters_filtered, search_contacts, and get_contact_with_channels — all added in this session.
New filtered list methods use dynamic WHERE clause construction with optional stage/practice_area filters plus LIMIT/OFFSET pagination; search uses LIKE '%query%' on name/email/phone columns.
ContactWithChannels struct added as a joined view (Contact + Vec<ContactChannel>); no DB join — implemented as two sequential queries in SqliteCrmStore.
GatewayServices struct uses Arc<dyn Trait> fields with noop/with_* builder pattern; crm_store: Arc<dyn CrmStore> field and with_crm_store() builder added following this convention.
SqliteCrmStore instantiated inside the cfg(feature="crm") block after migrations run, then passed to services.with_crm_store().

workflow: The autonomous agent workflow runs investigation and implementation as separate Linear state transitions (investigate → research-review → implement → implementation-review), with a persistent workpad Linear comment updated at each milestone.
Clippy caught unnecessary & borrows on Copy types in filter closures — easy fix but worth watching when writing iterator chains over enums.
Running compile checks per-crate (crm first, then gateway) before running the full test suite saved time by catching errors early in the smaller crate.

friction: Linear API authentication required trial-and-error — the API key needed to be passed directly (not as Bearer token) before MCP tooling worked.
Several intermediate compile errors from spurious import suppression attributes and unnecessary & borrows required additional edit passes on store_sqlite.rs and store_memory.rs.
Reading large files (store_sqlite.rs, server.rs) required multiple paginated reads to locate exact insertion points for edits.
open_items: REST/RPC API routes for CRM operations (/api/crm/* or crm.* RPC) — explicitly noted as likely out of scope for CHA-11, needs a separate issue/phase.
Cursor-based pagination (updated_at + id) deferred in favor of simpler offset/limit — acceptable for now but noted as a future scalability concern.
SQLite FTS5 full-text search deferred — LIKE-based search implemented for now; FTS5 table could be added later if performance becomes an issue.
tracing #[instrument] attributes on store methods not yet added — the tracing feature flag was added to Cargo.toml but actual instrumentation spans are still TODO.
